questionHtml: Explain the reason that Morgan’s results did not agree with expected Mendelian ratios in a dihybrid cross.
markschemeHtml:
1. gene linkage/genes located on the same chromosome;
  2. independent assortment does not occur;
  3. no recombination unless there is crossing over (between the genes);

Reject sex-linkage.

meta.title: Explain the reason that Morgan’s results did not agree with expected Mendelian ratios in a dihybrid cross.
